name: 101 Cats in Dubai
short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 kittens 🐾 in the hand-crafted Dubai landscape. 🏆 Earn lots of achievements. How many 😺 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️
detailed_description:
✍️ 101 Cats Hidden in Dubai challenges you to find hidden kitties in a beautiful hand-crafted landscape.

🎵 While you search, enjoy a peaceful and immersive soundtrack.

😸 Earn tons of achievements.

🏆 Challenge your friends to find all the cats in the shortest time! ⏱️

GAMEPLAY:

🐾 101 cats hidden in a single Landscape.
👉 Click on the kitties you find.
👀 Adjust brightness so your eyes don't get tired.
🔎 AMAZING ZOOM!

😺🐾🐈 😻

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic, Hindi, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
